name: player_season_projected_points single year_offset returns the offset-year in-query score (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (py 250, tdp 2) and 2025 (py 300) projections_index rows, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1]. The executed value must equal the in-query draftkings score of the 2024 row (250*0.04 + 2*4 = 18.00), proving the single offset shifts the join year and the points are computed in-query (NOT read from the precomputed scoring_format_player_projection_points total).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, ROUND((COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_attempts", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_completions", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_yards", 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_interceptions", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_touchdowns", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_attempts", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_yards", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fumbles_lost", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."targets", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receptions", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receiving_yards", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receiving_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."two_point_conversions", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."punt_return_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."kickoff_return_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."extra_points_made", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_0_19_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_20_29_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_30_39_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_40_49_yards", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_50_plus_yards", 0) * 5 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_sacks", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_interceptions", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_forced_fumbles", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_recovered_fumbles", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_three_and_outs", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_fourth_down_stops", 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_points_against", 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_yards_against", 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_blocked_kicks", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_safeties", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_two_point_returns", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_touchdowns", 0) * 6), 2) AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "projections_index" as "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a" on "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."season_year" = 2024 and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."week" = '0' and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."sourceid" = 18 and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."season_type" = 'REG' where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, ROUND((COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_attempts", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_completions", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_yards", 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."passing_interceptions", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_yards", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rushing_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fumbles_lost", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."targets", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receptions", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receiving_yards", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."receiving_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."two_point_conversions", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."punt_return_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."kickoff_return_touchdowns", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."extra_points_made", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_0_19_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_20_29_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_30_39_yards", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_40_49_yards", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."field_goals_made_50_plus_yards", 0) * 5 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_sacks", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_interceptions", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_forced_fumbles", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_recovered_fumbles", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_three_and_outs", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_fourth_down_stops", 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_points_against", 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_yards_against", 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_blocked_kicks", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_safeties", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_two_point_returns", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."defensive_touchdowns", 0) * 6), 2), "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, season_year, season_type, passing_yards, passing_touchdowns) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 250, 2)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, season_year, season_type, passing_yards, passing_touchdowns) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2025, 'REG', 300, 0)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(passing_yards * 0.04 + passing_touchdowns * 4, 2) AS season_projected_points_0 FROM projections_index WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-000915' AND season_year = 2024 AND sourceid = 18 AND week = 0 AND season_type = 'REG'
